questions.question: For a system with single pole on the real-axis (and no zeros)

answers.a: The system with pole in (0,1) acts as a low pass filter
answers.b: The system with pole in (0,1) acts as a high pass filter
answers.c: The system with pole in (-1,0) acts as a low pass filter
answers.d: The system with pole in (-1,0) acts as a high pass filter

questions.question: What is the effect of a pole near the unit circle in the z-plane?

explanations.explanations: A pole near the unit circle makes the system more oscillatory.

questions.question: Which property is true for a minimum-phase system?

answers.a: All zeros are inside the unit circle
answers.b: All poles are inside the unit circle
answers.c: All zeros are outside the unit circle
answers.d: All poles are outside the unit circle

explanations.explanations: Minimum-phase systems have all zeros inside the unit circle.

questions.question: If the ROC includes the unit circle, the system is:

explanations.explanations: ROC including the unit circle implies stability.
